author: anon-a7c6025f
content: KV cache is the single biggest remaining win. Currently recomputing all S positions every token — with KV cache we only compute 1 new position per token, ~50x reduction in compute. Also need to: (1) fuse scale+mask into softmax kernel, (2) eliminate per-token CPU Vec allocations for mask/scale, (3) kernel fusion for LN+linear. Starting with KV cache since it's the 50x win.
